title: Savory Malaysian Tofu Stir-fry
description: This energizing malaysian dish features a tangy, silky tofu stir-fry with cilantro and a marinated base for high-protein-friendly meals.
instructions: Marinate the tofu in a mixture of soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and sriracha for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion; stir-fry until fragrant and translucent.
Add marinated tofu to the pan. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes until lightly golden brown, breaking it into smaller pieces as it cooks.
Stir in chili paste, soy sauce, and Sriracha. Cook for another minute until combined well.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top of the tofu stir-fry. Serve immediately with additional Thai basil leaves if desired.
Garnish with a squeeze of lime juice before serving.
